home.name: Evyatar Hazan
home.subtitle: Full Stack Developer & AI Automation Specialist
home.description: Full Stack Developer and AI-driven automation infrastructure expert. I specialize in designing and developing mobile applications, scalable web systems, and advanced Computer Vision solutions. The synergy between end-to-end product development and intelligent validation technologies enables me to build smart, robust, and high-performance software systems.

about.p1: With extensive experience in software development and automation, I specialize in building technological products that combine an excellent user experience with robust backend architecture. My expertise includes native and cross-platform application development, deploying complex cloud services, and implementing Deep Learning models to solve visual and operational challenges.
about.p2: I am a strong advocate for Clean Code principles, Privacy by Design as a standard, and utilizing advanced CI/CD pipelines to ensure continuous quality. Over the years, I have led technological projects from initial characterization to full-scale deployment, providing technical mentorship to teams and collaborating closely with Product and QA departments.

password_gen.title: Password Generator
password_gen.description: A React Native application that locally generates highly secure deterministic passwords from a simple two-word input without collecting or storing any data.

ai_automation.title: AI Computer Vision Automation
ai_automation.description: Integrated YOLO computer vision models to dynamically detect UI elements in mobile applications, significantly improving cross-platform testing resilience.

spool.title: Collaborative Travel Platform
spool.description: Designed frontend architecture in React Native and implemented a complex trip distribution algorithmic engine handling real-time data flow.

contact.subtitle: I'm currently looking for new opportunities. Whether you have an inquiry regarding LLM workflows, automation, or frontend architecture, I'll try my best to get back to you!
contact.getInTouchDesc: Fill out the form and I'll be in touch as soon as possible.
